CurrentIssues.ID: PropertyName:DebugUtils.kt:/** * Whether the app is running in debug mode. * * This is a compile-time constant for the shared module. For runtime debug detection, use * [org.meshtastic.core.common.BuildConfigProvider.isDebug] from DI instead. */ @Suppress("ktlint:standard:property-naming", "TopLevelPropertyNaming") const val isDebug: Boolean = false
